appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: repository-state' section with isolation rules, testing tools, and key assertions for repository state validation

summary: Successfully validated VAL-REPO-003 (No PII or secrets in remote history). Remote repository contains 57 clean commits from rebase with no credential patterns, PII, or hardcoded secrets. Fresh clone verification confirmed secret scan passes and git history is clean. All verification completed in read-only isolated environment without modifying git state.
